tasks.start: deno task build:client && deno run --allow-net --allow-read server/main.ts
tasks.dev: deno task build:client && (deno task watch:client & deno run --allow-net --allow-read --watch server/main.ts)
tasks.fmt: deno fmt server/ && deno fmt client/
tasks.lint: deno lint server/ && deno lint client/
tasks.check: deno check server/ && deno task typecheck:client
